description: Lead Liaison is a sales and marketing automation platform combining event lead capture, website visitor tracking, marketing automation, and CRM integration for B2B revenue teams.
tagline: Event lead management, marketing automation, and website visitor tracking
overview: Lead Liaison helps B2B sales and marketing teams attract, capture, and convert leads through a unified platform that covers event lead management, website visitor tracking, marketing automation, and CRM integration. Its flexibility, deep visitor tracking, and built-in onboarding and certification resources make it accessible to teams that need a combined sales and marketing solution.
what_is: Lead Liaison is a sales and marketing automation platform designed to help businesses increase revenue by managing the full lead lifecycle from initial attraction through conversion and retention. It tracks website visitors in detail, automates marketing tasks, and manages leads across channels, with standout features including deep visitor identification, custom forms, and real-time lead segmentation. Dedicated onboarding support and a certification program help teams get up to speed quickly.

The platform performs particularly well in event settings, where its onsite lead capture tools enable sales teams to collect and qualify prospects in real time. Custom forms and automated segmentation mean that leads can be routed and engaged immediately after capture, compressing the time between first contact and a qualified conversation. Lead Liaison integrates with CRMs and email platforms, positioning it as a central hub for all lead management and marketing insight activity.

Lead Liaison is not a simple standalone CRM or a basic email tool. It is built for companies that need a combined sales and marketing solution with advanced tracking, automation, and analytics in a single platform, making it most valuable to B2B teams running both event-based and digital demand generation programs.
